problem id: eb359ea5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND SHR(6)) XOR SHL(2)

examples:
  00100010 -> 10001000
  01011100 -> 01110000
  00111101 -> 11110100
  11001101 -> 00110110
  01101101 -> 10110100
  10101100 -> 10110010
  01110101 -> 11010100
  01110011 -> 11001101
  10001100 -> 00110010

query: 01011001
predicted answer: 01100100
